meta.title: Arnaud Martiny | Full-Stack Web Developer – Portfolio & Custom Development
meta.description: Passionate Full-Stack Developer based in Brussels. I turn your ideas into modern web applications, from UX/UI design in Figma to full development. Explore my projects and let's talk!

about.title: ABOUT ME
about.paragraph1: For me, a website is much more than a showcase. It's the digital meeting point between an idea and its audience. My passion is to build this connection: to design web experiences that are not only beautiful but also logical, efficient, and intuitive.
about.paragraph2: My Full-Stack approach allows me to manage this vision from A to Z. On the Back-End, I architect robust server logic and databases (PHP, MySQL) that form the application's backbone. On the Front-End, I sculpt every interaction to create a fluid and engaging user experience (UX/UI), where technology becomes invisible.
about.paragraph3: This dual expertise is my greatest strength: it ensures total consistency between technology and design. Eager for challenges and meticulous, I approach every project—whether creating a custom platform or optimizing a Shopify store—with the same commitment: to deliver a reliable, effective digital product that you will be proud of.
about.imageAlt: Portrait of me to illustrate the About section

terminal.sectionTitle: MY AI ANSWERS YOUR QUESTIONS ABOUT ME

suggestions.command: Tell me about his most important projects.
What was his role during his internship at Nowa Market?
What is his proficiency in Figma?

items.description: A comprehensive experience where I designed the Nowa Logistics showcase site from A to Z (UX/UI in Figma, front-end development). I also contributed to strategic projects: business plan analysis, creating investor pitch decks, and improving the internal ERP's UX/translation.

IT consulting mission to structure and develop the company's digital ecosystem. My responsibilities include competitive analysis (benchmarks), creating and technically managing online stores ('print shops'), and integrating product catalogs.
Complete management of the Shopify online store (products, optimization, and catalog). Improvement of UX and customer journey via Front-end adjustments.

Focused on modernizing the WordPress store (Flatsome theme). I handle continuous SEO improvements, code cleanup, creating new pages, product integration, and managing the blog to boost the online presence.

Complete overhaul of the nonprofit's website, which was outdated, hacked, and unmanageable. I designed a modern interface and developed a secure, easy-to-manage solution for the theater team, tailored to a non-technical client with a limited budget.

items.title: Snoussi Studio
items.description: The challenge: Create a premium digital showcase segmenting three distinct activities (Photo, Branding, Social) without breaking brand unity. My solution: An innovative vertical triptych navigation, an immersive 'Dark Mode' design with electric violet accents, and full optimization for high-res media.

caseStudy.title: C:\Projects\Snoussi_Studio_V1.exe
caseStudy.brief: The studio needed a site reflecting its high-end positioning and expertise in vertical content creation (Reels/TikTok). The goal was to break away from classic portfolio codes.
caseStudy.role: Technical & Art Direction. I designed the 'One-Page Multi-Section' architecture and coded specific interactions (interactive vertical tiles). I also managed asset optimization to ensure fast loading despite heavy 4K visuals.
caseStudy.results: A fluid, impactful platform that now serves as a central pillar for Corporate and Event client acquisition.

items.title: Arnaud Martiny - Portfolio
items.description: The challenge: to demonstrate my mastery of core web technologies without relying on frameworks. My solution: I designed and developed this platform from scratch using pure HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, integrating complex animations with GSAP and a custom translation system. This project showcases my ability to architect a robust and optimized front-end application.

caseStudy.title: C:\Projects\Portfolio_Meta.exe
caseStudy.brief: How to create a portfolio that is more than a resume, but a true demonstration of skills? The goal was to build an immersive experience coded in 'vanilla' (without major frameworks) to prove a fundamental mastery of web technologies, interaction design, and performance optimization.
caseStudy.role: As the sole developer, I orchestrated everything: UX/UI design in Figma, front-end development in HTML/CSS/JS, and integration of complex animations with GSAP. The 'mobile-first' approach ensured perfect responsiveness, and I implemented a custom-built internationalization (i18n) system for global reach.
caseStudy.results: The result is a high-performance, interactive website that is fully manageable via JSON files. This project allowed me to solidify my skills in front-end architecture, DOM optimization, and creating a memorable user experience from scratch.

items.title: Nowa Logistics
items.imageAlt: Preview of the Nowa Logistics project
items.description: The challenge: to create the digital identity for Nowa Market's new logistics entity. My solution: during my internship, I took full ownership of this project, from the UX/UI mockups in Figma to the complete front-end development. This experience proved my ability to manage a project autonomously in a professional setting and deliver a finished product that meets a concrete business need.

caseStudy.title: C:\Projects\Nowa_Logistics_Showcase.exe
caseStudy.brief: The new entity 'Nowa Logistics' needed a professional showcase website to establish its credibility, present its sustainable logistics services, and generate qualified business leads. The challenge was to translate a business vision into an effective and modern digital tool.
caseStudy.role: I led this project from conception to delivery. After defining the site structure and user journey, I created mockups and prototypes in Figma. I then developed the site using pure HTML/CSS/JS for optimal performance and integrated a functional PHP contact form.
caseStudy.results: The project resulted in a showcase site ready for launch, perfectly meeting the client's needs. This internship experience was crucial for learning how to manage a project in real-world conditions, collaborate with teams, and transform a business request into a finished product.

items.title: Le Théâtre des Poètes
items.imageAlt: Preview of the Théâtre des Poètes project
items.description: The challenge: replace an aging, hacked site for a non-profit on a budget. My solution: A complete overhaul focusing on security, modern design, and ease of management. Website officially launched!

caseStudy.title: C:\Projects\Theatre_Poetes_Reboot.exe
caseStudy.brief: The non-profit needed to replace a hacked, outdated website. The mission: start from scratch to build a reliable online presence.
caseStudy.role: A-to-Z redesign: Modern Figma interface, followed by the development of a secure, easy-to-manage site for the NPO team.
caseStudy.results: The site is live! It provides a professional, secure, and mobile-friendly showcase.

items.title: Fast 'N Friends
items.imageAlt: Preview of the Fast N Friends project
items.description: The challenge: as part of a two-person team, build a fully functional carpooling platform from the ground up. My role was central to the back-end: I designed the MySQL database and developed the core logic in PHP, handling user management, sessions, and ride postings. This project was key to strengthening my back-end development skills and my experience with team collaboration using Git.

caseStudy.title: C:\Projects\FastNFriends_Platform.exe
caseStudy.brief: As part of this fictional academic project, the challenge was to build a 100% functional carpooling platform as a two-person team. The specifications required complete user management, an ad posting system, and a search engine, all based on a relational database.
caseStudy.role: My primary role focused on the database architecture (MySQL) and developing a large part of the back-end logic in PHP. I programmed the critical modules: profiles, sessions, trip posting, and search. I also contributed to the development of the custom WordPress theme to integrate these features.
caseStudy.results: This project was a technical and collaborative success. It allowed me to practice advanced PHP/SQL skills, understand the challenges of collaboration via Git, and grasp the complexity of creating a dynamic web application from end to end.

caseStudyPopup.authorMessageText:
I hope you enjoyed this little experience!

If you're looking for a creative developer to bring an idea to life, let's talk.

cards.skillDescription: Transforming an abstract vision into a concrete and engaging interface by finding unique visual solutions.
Taking charge of projects from A to Z, from researching solutions to final implementation with rigor and proactivity.
Explaining technical concepts to non-experts and collaborating effectively with all project stakeholders.
Analyzing, breaking down, and solving technical or functional challenges with method, calm, and perseverance.
Actively contributing to collective success by sharing my knowledge and supporting my colleagues.
Easily navigating between different technologies and work methods, and adjusting to unforeseen project changes.

privacyModal.title: Privacy Policy & GDPR
privacyModal.intro: Transparency is key. As a Web Developer, I am committed to protecting your privacy in compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). Here is how your data is handled.
privacyModal.contactFormIntro: When you use the contact form, I collect only the data strictly necessary to reply to you:
contactFormPoints: Legal Basis: GDPR Art. 6(1)(b) (Performance of pre-contractual measures at your request).
Retention: Deleted after 2 years of inactivity, or immediately upon request.
privacyModal.contactFormPurpose: This data is never sold. It is used solely for professional correspondence.
privacyModal.aiAssistantIntro: This site uses an AI module (via the Groq API) to power the interactive terminal.
aiAssistantPoints: Operation: The text you type is sent to a third-party provider (Groq) to generate a response.
Warning: Do not share any personal data (name, phone, passwords) in the terminal.
History: Conversations are anonymized and are not permanently stored on my servers.
privacyModal.aiAssistantPurpose: Using the terminal implies consent to this specific technical processing.
privacyModal.landingPageIntro: This site uses Google Analytics 4 (GA4) with IP anonymization enabled by default.
landingPagePoints: Third-Party Cookies (GA4): Analyze traffic anonymously (country, device type, page views).
Local Storage: Stores your preferences (Dark/Light Theme, Language, Cursor choice). This data remains on your device.
Opt-out: You can block cookies via your browser settings.
privacyModal.landingPagePurpose: Preference data (Local Storage) is exempt from consent as it is strictly necessary for the interface functionality (GDPR Art. 82).
privacyModal.yourRightsText:
In accordance with regulations, you have full control over your data:

• Right of Access & Rectification: You may request to see the data I hold about you and correct it.
• Right to Erasure ('Right to be Forgotten'): You may request the immediate deletion of your emails and exchanges.
• Right to Restriction: You may request a temporary freeze on the use of your data.
• Right to Object: You may refuse the use of your data (e.g., deleting Analytics stats).

To exercise these rights, simply email arnaudmartiny0@gmail.com. I commit to responding within 30 days.

experiencesDetailsPage.pageSubtitle: A detailed overview of my freelance collaborations, the challenges faced, and the technical solutions provided.

ozen.title: Ô ZEN Esthétique
ozen.subtitle: Creation of a custom booking platform
ozen.context: The Ô ZEN Esthétique institute historically relied on the TreatWell platform for its bookings. The problem? Exorbitant commissions drastically reducing margins, a complete lack of control over content, and a rigid interface. The client had an old, unfinished, and poorly ranked Wix site. The challenge was significant: create a complete independent platform capable of handling bookings, payments, and marketing, all with impeccable local SEO.
ozen.solution:
I decided to abandon traditional CMS platforms to develop a 100% custom solution in PHP (over 103 files and 18,000 lines of code).

Front-End & Customer Experience: I designed a frictionless booking funnel as a 'Single Page Application' (SPA) in Vanilla JS. Clients can compose their session, choose their time slots, and pay online. To reduce drop-offs, I integrated a 'Guest' mode (without mandatory registration).

Secure Payment: Native integration of the Stripe API (without heavy plugins) with asynchronous Webhook management to validate time slots in the database.

Back-Office (Admin): Creation of an ultra-secure administration panel (2FA Authentication, anti-brute force). This dashboard generates time slots, manages the customer CRM, and allows the creation of promotional codes.

Acquisition & Tracking: Development of an internal newsletter system with integration of invisible pixels to track open and click rates without relying on third-party solutions like Mailchimp.
ozen.results: The client was able to break free from third-party platforms. The site achieves 'Core Web Vitals' scores of 100% (PageSpeed Insights), ensuring powerful local SEO. The interface is fast (<800ms on mobile), secure (AES-256 encryption for GDPR data), and evolves weekly according to business needs.

snoussi.title: Snoussi Studio
snoussi.subtitle: Premium B2B Showcase & Pure Code
snoussi.context: Sofiane, a social media manager and content creator, needed a website to establish the credibility of his studio (Photo, Branding, Podcast). The goal was not to create a simple showcase site, but a high-end, ultra-fast platform capable of converting B2B visitors into regular clients, while aggressively positioning itself on search engines.
snoussi.solution:
Rather than using Webflow or WordPress, I opted for a 'Back-to-Basics / Pure Code' approach to guarantee absolute performance.

Architecture & Speed: Site coded in PHP and native HTML/CSS with a lightweight SQLite database for the studio's booking system. Result: a loading time of less than 1.2s.

Visual Immersion (GSAP): For the 'Wow' effect, I integrated the GSAP library. The site features smooth scroll animations (ScrollTrigger), magnetic effects on buttons, skew on scroll distortions, and a custom morphological cursor.

SEO Strategy: Creation of a structure of more than 15 targeted service pages (e.g., 'Portrait photographer Brussels'). I implemented clean URL Rewriting (.htaccess) and injected JSON-LD microdata (FAQPage, LocalBusiness) to dominate Google search results.

Anti-spam Security: Rather than using a frustrating reCAPTCHA, I coded an invisible 'Honeypot' system that traps bots, coupled with a secure administration interface using an OTP token (2FA via email).
snoussi.results: The site is a true lead magnet. The premium user experience combined with surgical SEO allowed the studio to sign multiple new B2B contracts shortly after launch.

localweb.title: Local Web
localweb.subtitle: Automation, Tech SEO & Webmastering
localweb.context: I joined the Local Web agency for an intensive 3rd-year internship (which turned into a freelance mission). The agency manages a large volume of clients and needed to optimize its internal processes, accelerate its acquisition strategies, and flawlessly maintain a variety of websites.
localweb.solution:
I wore two hats: technical and strategic.

Automation & Data: I developed internal No-Code tools (via Lovable) to structure link-building tracking. I also set up massive Web Scraping scripts to build ultra-qualified B2B databases, saving the team dozens of hours.

Technical SEO & Strategy: I took charge of managing Core Web Vitals on several projects, fixing CLS and LCP issues. I implemented sharp On-Page strategies and creative Off-Page campaigns (notably via Reddit Backlinking techniques).

Webmastering (21 Projects): I managed the daily technical operations for about twenty clients. This includes full UX redesigns (e.g., SOS Diogène), complex integrations, and the technical and structural translation of sites into FR, EN, and NL (e.g., CD Engineering).
localweb.results: I accomplished over 171 complex technical tasks in record time (estimated at 206h+ during the first period). My ability to automate repetitive tasks and solve infrastructure problems convinced the agency to extend our collaboration as a freelancer.

oxxoprint.title: Oxxoprint
oxxoprint.subtitle: B2B E-commerce Ecosystem (Web-to-Print)
oxxoprint.context: Oxxoprint, a major player in printing and visual communication, wanted to modernize and digitize order processing for its 'Key Account' clients. The goal was to deploy highly customized B2B webshops using the complex OnPrintShop software solution.
oxxoprint.solution:
I intervened as a technical consultant and front-end developer to bridge the gap between the software platform and the specific needs of clients.

Front-End Development: Advanced integration in HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript to overcome the native limits of the OnPrintShop platform. I created 'snippets' (reusable code blocks) to dynamically modify interfaces and improve UX.

Configuration & Architecture: Technical setup of client portals, configuration of complex catalogs, and management of B2B pricing rules.

UX & Quality Assurance: Conducting competitive benchmarks and executing in-depth tests on purchasing journeys (QA Testing) to ensure a corporate client can order printed materials without any technical friction.
oxxoprint.results: The deployment of the first B2B web-to-print portals allowed Oxxoprint to build loyalty with its corporate clientele by offering them total autonomy, while relieving the traditional customer service.

chouiamaison.title: Chouïa Maison
chouiamaison.subtitle: E-commerce & Data-driven Optimization
chouiamaison.context: Chouïa Maison is a rapidly growing decorative crafts store. The WordPress site (using WooCommerce / Flatsome theme) required regular technical support to handle traffic increases, fix historical bugs, and boost organic sales (SEO).
chouiamaison.solution:
I established a continuous optimization routine, blending technical development and marketing analysis.

Technical Overhaul: Cleaning up legacy code, securely updating the WordPress ecosystem, and optimizing product page load times.

SEO Strategy & Content: Researching transactional keywords, semantic writing for new categories, and structurally managing the blog to attract 'Top of Funnel' traffic.

Data-Driven Analysis: Rigorous tracking of conversion funnels. I regularly analyze customer journeys leading to abandoned carts to propose and implement immediate UX fixes.
chouiamaison.results: A much more stable, faster, and Google-friendly e-commerce platform. This foundational work, carried out over time, significantly increased organic traffic and optimized the store's overall conversion rate.

theatrepoetes.title: Le Théâtre des Poètes NPO
theatrepoetes.subtitle: Digital Resurrection
theatrepoetes.context: This cultural non-profit was in an emergency situation: their website, dating from 2015, had been hacked. It was non-responsive, visually obsolete, and completely impossible for the team (who had no technical skills) to update. The budget was limited, but the need for a clean showcase for the theatrical back-to-school season was critical.
theatrepoetes.solution:
Rather than 'patching' the old site, I made the decision to tear it all down to rebuild a clean, secure, and custom architecture.

Database & Security: Design of a new, clean MySQL structure. I implemented a system of prepared statements (PDO) to eradicate any future risk of SQL injection.

Ultra-Simplified Back-Office: Knowing the end-users were not developers, I created a custom PHP administration panel, stripping it down to the essentials: add a play, edit a date, publish news. Zero fluff.

Front-End & Accessibility: Development of a responsive interface, respecting web accessibility standards (contrast, semantic markup) to highlight the troupe's visuals and make the program easy to read.
theatrepoetes.results: A successful launch for the new season. The NPO regained its digital independence with a fast tool, immune to common vulnerabilities, and managed autonomously by the administrative team.

nowamarket.title: Nowa Market (Nowa Logistics)
nowamarket.subtitle: From Mockup to ERP
nowamarket.context: Nowa Market, a zero-waste e-commerce startup, was launching a new branch: Nowa Logistics. My internship (second year of bachelor's) threw me into the deep end: I had to both create the public digital identity for this new service and work on the complex internal tools (ERP) used by warehouse staff.
nowamarket.solution:
I adopted a hybrid role (Design, Code, Strategy).

Showcase Site (Front-End): I managed the project from A to Z. Creation of wireframes and high-fidelity mockups in Figma. Then, I developed the site in HTML/CSS/JS to ensure a pixel-perfect integration.

UX Audit & Internal Tools: I conducted usability audits on the mobile app and the warehouse management ERP. I identified frictions in QR code scanning (glass jars) and proposed corrective scenarios. I also technically translated the entire ERP interface via JSON configuration files.

Business Strategy: I assisted management in key tasks: analyzing the business plan, drafting presentations (Pitch Decks) for future fundraising, and structuring internal communication.
nowamarket.results: A pivotal experience that validated my ability to understand the 'Product' and 'Business' challenges of a company, and not limit myself to writing lines of code.

degrifshoes.title: Degrif Shoes
degrifshoes.subtitle: E-commerce Management & Front-End Optimization
degrifshoes.context: Managing an active retail store requires great rigor. The challenge at Degrif Shoes was to ensure a smooth and rapid transition of physical products to the digital storefront on Shopify, while ensuring a frictionless purchasing journey for the end user.
degrifshoes.solution:
I took charge of the operational and technical management of the platform.

Merchandising & Integration: Full management of the product catalog. Integration of visuals, logical organization of collections, and writing SEO-optimized descriptions for e-commerce.

Front-End Optimization: I made direct adjustments to the Shopify theme code (HTML/CSS) to highlight flagship products and fix mobile display issues.

UX Improvement: Analysis and modification of the overall ergonomics to streamline navigation between categories and simplify the steps leading to the shopping cart.
degrifshoes.results: A consistently updated store with a coherent visual presentation and minimized purchasing friction. This hands-on immersion allowed me to develop great versatility in the e-commerce ecosystem, refine my UX sense, and build the rigor essential for digital content management.
